text: A developer needs to deploy a Dockerized application to AWS ECS. Which of the following AWS services are essential for this deployment, assuming a Fargate launch type and public internet access?

options.A: Amazon S3 for container image storage
options.B: Amazon ECR for container image registry
options.C: Amazon ECS for orchestration
options.D: AWS Fargate for serverless compute

text: Consider a Kubernetes deployment for a web application. The application needs to scale based on HTTP request latency. Which Kubernetes resource and metric configuration would best achieve this?

options.A: Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) with CPU utilization metric
options.B: Horizontal Pod Autoscaler (HPA) with custom metrics from an external monitoring system
options.C: Vertical Pod Autoscaler (VPA) to adjust resource requests
options.D: Cluster Autoscaler to add more nodes

text: A serverless function (AWS Lambda) processes sensitive customer data. Which practices are crucial to ensure data security and compliance within the function's execution environment?

options.A: Granting the Lambda execution role `AdministratorAccess` for convenience.
options.B: Storing sensitive configuration data directly in environment variables.
options.C: Implementing least privilege for the Lambda execution role.
options.D: Encrypting data at rest and in transit using AWS KMS and TLS.

text: You are designing a CI/CD pipeline for a microservice. Which of the following stages are typically included in a robust CI/CD pipeline for deploying to Kubernetes?

options.A: Code compilation and unit testing
options.B: Container image build and push to registry
options.C: Manual approval for every deployment to production
options.D: Kubernetes manifest application and health checks

text: When defining infrastructure using Terraform, a team wants to ensure an S3 bucket is private by default and only accessible via specific IAM roles. Which Terraform configurations are necessary?

options.A: Setting `acl = "public-read"` on the S3 bucket resource.
options.B: Attaching a bucket policy that denies public access and allows specific IAM roles.
options.C: Enabling `block_public_acls` and `restrict_public_buckets` for the S3 bucket.
options.D: Configuring an IAM policy for the roles allowing `s3:GetObject` on the bucket.

text: A Dockerfile includes the following layers. Which ordering is generally preferred to optimize build times by leveraging Docker's layer caching mechanism in a CI pipeline?
code:
FROM node:16-alpine
COPY . .
RUN npm install
EXPOSE 3000
CMD ["npm", "start"]

options.A:
FROM node:16-alpine
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install
COPY . .
CMD ["npm", "start"]
options.B:
FROM node:16-alpine
COPY . .
RUN npm install
CMD ["npm", "start"]
options.C:
FROM node:16-alpine
RUN npm install
COPY . .
CMD ["npm", "start"]
options.D:
FROM node:16-alpine
EXPOSE 3000
COPY . .
RUN npm install
CMD ["npm", "start"]

text: An application running on Kubernetes needs to connect to an AWS RDS database. What are the recommended secure practices for managing the database credentials within Kubernetes?

options.A: Hardcoding credentials directly into the application's source code.
options.B: Storing credentials as plain text in Kubernetes ConfigMaps.
options.C: Using Kubernetes Secrets encrypted at rest and mounted as environment variables or files.
options.D: Integrating with an external secrets management service like AWS Secrets Manager or HashiCorp Vault.

text: You are setting up monitoring for an application deployed on AWS EC2 instances. Which metrics are crucial for identifying potential scaling needs and performance bottlenecks?

options.A: CPU Utilization
options.B: Disk I/O operations
options.C: Network In/Out bytes
options.D: Number of active users on the website

text: A team is migrating an on-premises application to AWS. The application uses a relational database. Which AWS database services offer high availability and automatic failover capabilities?

options.A: Amazon RDS Multi-AZ deployments
options.B: Amazon DynamoDB
options.C: Amazon Aurora with multiple reader instances
options.D: Amazon Redshift

text: When designing for high availability in AWS, a common strategy is to distribute resources across multiple Availability Zones (AZs). Which AWS services inherently support or require multi-AZ deployment for HA?

options.A: Single EC2 instance
options.B: Application Load Balancer (ALB)
options.C: Amazon RDS Multi-AZ
options.D: Amazon S3

text: A Kubernetes Pod is stuck in `ImagePullBackOff` status. Which of the following could be potential causes for this issue?

options.A: Incorrect image name or tag in the Pod definition.
options.B: Lack of network connectivity from the node to the container registry.
options.C: Insufficient CPU resources allocated to the Pod.
options.D: Missing or incorrect image pull secret for a private registry.

text: You are implementing a blue/green deployment strategy using a CI/CD pipeline for a web application. Which of the following are key characteristics or requirements for this strategy?

options.A: Maintaining two identical production environments (blue and green).
options.B: Gradually shifting traffic from the old version to the new version.
options.C: The ability to quickly roll back to the previous stable version.
options.D: Requires downtime during the deployment process.

text: An AWS Lambda function is experiencing high cold start times. Which factors are known to contribute significantly to Lambda cold starts?

options.A: Using a large deployment package size.
options.B: Choosing a compiled language like Java or C# over Node.js or Python.
options.C: Having a high memory allocation for the function.
options.D: Infrequent invocations of the function.

text: When designing network security for an application hosted on AWS EC2, what are the primary differences between Security Groups and Network Access Control Lists (NACLs)?

options.A: Security Groups operate at the instance level; NACLs operate at the subnet level.
options.B: Security Groups are stateful; NACLs are stateless.
options.C: Security Groups support allow rules only; NACLs support both allow and deny rules.
options.D: Security Groups process rules in order; NACLs process all rules simultaneously.

text: A company wants to implement GitOps for their Kubernetes deployments. Which of the following principles are fundamental to a GitOps workflow?

options.A: All infrastructure and application configurations are stored in Git.
options.B: Changes are applied manually by developers directly to the cluster.
options.C: An automated agent synchronizes the cluster state with the Git repository.
options.D: Rollbacks are performed by reverting Git commits.

text: You are troubleshooting a Kubernetes service that is intermittently unreachable from outside the cluster. Which of the following could be potential causes?

options.A: Incorrect `selector` in the Service definition not matching Pod labels.
options.B: Insufficient CPU/memory allocated to the Pods.
options.C: Firewall rules (e.g., NetworkPolicy, Security Group) blocking traffic.
options.D: The Ingress controller is not running or misconfigured.

text: An organization is using AWS CloudFormation for Infrastructure as Code. Which of the following are valid strategies for managing sensitive parameters like database passwords within CloudFormation templates?

options.A: Hardcoding passwords directly into the CloudFormation template.
options.B: Using AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store to store and retrieve parameters.
options.C: Passing passwords as plain text parameters during stack creation.
options.D: Referencing AWS Secrets Manager secrets within the template.

text: When building a Docker image, which of the following practices help reduce the final image size and improve security?

options.A: Using a minimal base image (e.g., Alpine).
options.B: Installing unnecessary packages and dependencies.
options.C: Leveraging multi-stage builds to discard build-time dependencies.
options.D: Removing temporary files and caches after installation.

text: A serverless API Gateway endpoint is experiencing high latency. Which of the following could contribute to increased latency for an API Gateway + Lambda setup?

options.A: Lambda function cold starts.
options.B: High network latency between the client and API Gateway region.
options.C: Inefficient database queries within the Lambda function.
options.D: Using API Gateway caching with a short TTL.

text: You are responsible for monitoring a production Kubernetes cluster. Which types of metrics and logs are essential for effective observability and troubleshooting?

options.A: Pod CPU/memory utilization and resource requests/limits.
options.B: Application-specific logs (e.g., HTTP access logs, error logs).
options.C: Node-level metrics (e.g., disk usage, network I/O).
options.D: User login credentials for all applications.

text: An AWS S3 bucket is configured to host a static website. Which of the following security measures should be implemented to protect the website content and ensure secure access?

options.A: Enabling S3 bucket versioning.
options.B: Configuring a bucket policy to allow public read access for `s3:GetObject`.
options.C: Using CloudFront with an Origin Access Control (OAC) to restrict direct S3 access.
options.D: Enabling S3 server-side encryption (SSE-S3).

text: A CI/CD pipeline needs to deploy changes to a Kubernetes cluster. Which authentication methods are commonly used and recommended for the CI/CD agent to interact with the Kubernetes API server securely?

options.A: Using a Kubernetes Service Account with appropriate RBAC permissions.
options.B: Embedding a user's `kubeconfig` file directly in the CI/CD script.
options.C: Using a long-lived static token with cluster-admin privileges.
options.D: Leveraging cloud provider IAM roles (e.g., AWS EKS IAM roles for service accounts).

text: Consider an application running on AWS EC2 instances behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). For effective auto-scaling, which metrics are typically used to trigger scaling policies?

options.A: Target Group RequestCountPerTarget
options.B: EC2 Instance CPU Utilization
options.C: ALB HealthyHostCount
options.D: DynamoDB ConsumedReadCapacityUnits

text: You are designing a multi-region disaster recovery strategy for an application using AWS. Which of the following approaches provide active-passive or active-active capabilities across regions?

options.A: AWS Route 53 with failover routing policies.
options.B: Deploying a single EC2 instance in one region.
options.C: AWS Global Accelerator to direct traffic to the nearest healthy endpoint.
options.D: Amazon Aurora Global Database for cross-region replication.

text: A developer needs to create a custom Docker network to isolate containers of a multi-service application. Which command correctly creates a bridge network named `my-app-network`?

options.A: `docker network create --driver host my-app-network`
options.B: `docker network create --driver bridge my-app-network`
options.C: `docker network connect my-app-network`
options.D: `docker create network my-app-network`
